nodes.label: UI Background Texture: Charcoal Noise
nodes.description: A dark, near-black seamless noise/texture pattern with a subtle charcoal tone. The surface has a muted, organic grain with slight variation in luminosity — resembling a worn matte blackboard, rough concrete, or charcoal-dusted material. The color palette is almost entirely desaturated dark grey and black with very faint mid-tone highlights concentrated toward the center. Intended as a UI panel background for the InventoryPage, providing a gritty, dark atmosphere without harsh contrast.
nodes.visual_pattern: organic noise grain, seamless tile, subtle vignette-like darkening at edges
nodes.intended_usage: UI background for InventoryPage in GameMenu

nodes.label: InventoryPage Background Layer
nodes.description: Folder-level node representing the background asset group for the InventoryPage UI screen.

nodes.label: Backpack Equipment Slot Icon
nodes.description: White outline icon representing a backpack/bag equipment slot. Front-facing view of a tactical/adventure backpack with a top handle, large main compartment with a front pocket flap, two side pockets at the bottom, and side straps/loops. Rendered in a flat, dashed/dotted outline style on a transparent background. Used in the inventory UI to indicate the backpack equipment slot.
nodes.design_details: Top carry handle, large main compartment, front zippered pocket, two lower side pockets, side compression straps

properties.icon_description: Pixelated water bottle or carton with a white cap/lid and a blue body filled with blue liquid, rendered in a flat pixel art style

properties.design_details: large tactical backpack with multiple buckle straps, front pocket, side pockets, top handle, padded structure

properties.description: Category grouping for backpack equipment icons in the game UI

A muted blue-gray camera icon with a diagonal strikethrough line, representing a missing or unavailable image. Used as the fallback/default icon when no specific item icon is available in the UI system.
properties.visual_design: Camera silhouette with a diagonal strikethrough line (no-image symbol), rendered in a flat, muted blue-gray color scheme
properties.purpose: Placeholder/fallback icon displayed when an item has no assigned icon or when an icon fails to load

properties.description: The System/Default folder within the icon hierarchy, housing the fallback icon used across the game UI
